title: Filter Sales Data by Region Step by Step
summary: Apply region filters to sales uploads, compare totals, and save rules for repeatable reporting.

content.summary: Apply region filters to sales uploads, compare totals, and save rules for repeatable reporting.

body.text: Regional sales reviews start with the same question: what did each territory contribute? Filters make that answer consistent week to week. Upload your sales CSV with a region or territory column. Open filters and select one or multiple regions—or exclude inactive territories.

body.alt: Team collaborating around data on a screen
body.caption: Team collaborating around data on a screen. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Upload your sales CSV with a region or territory column. Open filters and select one or multiple regions—or exclude inactive territories.
Watch summary totals update as filters apply. Cross-check against a pivot you trust in Excel to build confidence.

items: Combine region filters with date ranges for period reviews.
Use 'not equals' filters to isolate a problem region.

body.text: Duplicate the view with a different region selection to compare side by side via charts. Export filtered rows for regional managers.
Saved rules reload when you upload fresh data—no manual re-selection every Monday.
Regional reviews get faster when upload, filter, chart, and saved rules live in one Datilio workflow.

meta_description: Apply region filters to sales uploads, compare totals, and save rules for repeatable reporting.
